def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta

    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    rsi_threshold = params['rsi_threshold']

    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window).average_true_range()
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)

    df['signal'] = 0
    df.loc[(df['close'] > df['close'].shift(1) + df['atr']) & (df['rsi'] < rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = 1
    df.loc[(df['close'] < df['close'].shift(1) - df['atr']) & (df['rsi'] > 100 - rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = -1

    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: EUR/GBP exhibits momentum shifts when price breaks out of ATR-defined ranges, confirmed by RSI extremes indicating overbought/oversold conditions.
